steps.t: You should speak with Galadriel's envoys in the Limlight Gorge. Captain Agelbrit says the Elves were last seen headed down towards the far end of the …
You should ask the Ents of Fangorn what troubles have beset them recently.
Greylimb waits with Thickbark beside the river. You should speak with Greylimb about his illness.
Erymeldir waits beside the river. You should speak with Erymeldir and learn if he knows a remedy for the Ents and their trees.
